title: cardamine hirsuta f. litoralis
intro: Cardamine hirsuta f. litoralis, a subspecies of the hairy bittercress plant, is a type of flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cardamine hirsuta f. litoralis include reducing inflammation and pain, treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits and optimal preparation methods.
